name: Kinik Company
summary: Kinik Company produces and sells various abrasives, cutting tools, and reclaimed wafers in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers various conventional grinding wheels, diamond/CBN grinding wheels, DLC coatings, reclaimed wafers, porous ceramic chuck tables, CMP diamond disks, ultra precision machining tools, dicing blades, diamond rollers, wafer grinding wheels, diamond and CBN honey comb wheels, and anti-slip type vacuum chucks. Kinik Company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
